title: Brian Kerrigan
compiled_truth: Brian Kerrigan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-28 to 2001-06-29), Brian Kerrigan sent 6 and received 115 emails, totalling 121 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (4), [Greg Johnston](people/greg-johnston) (3), [Richard Sanders](people/richard-sanders) (2), [Peter Keohane](people/peter-keohane) (2), [Clement Abrams](people/clement-abrams) (1).
